message:
test: massive test enrichment batch across 47 source modules (~13,000 lines)

Add comprehensive serde roundtrip, Display, clone/eq, edge case, and
boundary condition tests to 47 modules. Each module receives 100-530
lines of new inline #[test] functions covering:

- Serde roundtrip validation for all public serializable types
- Display/Debug trait formatting verification
- Clone and PartialEq independence checks
- Boundary conditions (zero, max, overflow, empty collections)
- Error variant exhaustive coverage
- Deterministic ordering and hash consistency

Modules enriched (alphabetical):
attested_execution_cell, bifurcation_boundary_scanner,
cancellation_lifecycle, conformance_vector_gen, cross_repo_contract,
delegate_cell_harness, dp_budget_accountant, error_code,
evidence_emission, execution_orchestrator, flow_lattice,
frankenlab_release_gate, frontier_demo_gate, gc_pause, hash_tiers,
hostcall_telemetry, ifc_provenance_index,
incentive_governance_mechanism, key_attestation, key_derivation,
lab_runtime, lease_tracker, obligation_integration,
observability_channel_model, observability_probe_design,
observability_quality_sentinel, one_lever_policy, optimal_stopping,
parser_arena, parser_evidence_indexer, plas_release_gate,
principal_key_roles, proof_release_gate, quarantine_mesh_gate,
remote_capability_gate, revocation_enforcement,
runtime_decision_theory, runtime_observability, security_e2e,
signature_preimage, sorted_multisig, specialization_index,
specialization_perf_release_gate, storage_adapter, supervision,
third_party_verifier, version_matrix_lane

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
